raw_title: Digital Cinematic Apparatus and Spectator Subjectivity to Explore the Communication Behaviours in Self-Media Platforms
raw_abstract: Since 1949, the PRC has used cinema as a key instrument for shaping national identity and communicating state narratives. It tracks the changing forms of how filmmakers imagined a national ideology — through structures, aesthetics, cinematography, and technology — from 2001 to 2023 in the cinema. This research examines how cinema operates as a mode of ideological interpretation by analyzing how it activates certain spectator subjectivity and national discourses through the lens of Baudry’s Cinematic Apparatus Theory and Althusser’s Ideological State Apparatus (ISA) Theory. Conducted as a systematic literature review (SLR) of 23 peer-reviewed articles coupled with contextual analysis of representative films that usher in some of the film industry’s most significant ideological transformations, this study has various objectives. The preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses (PRISMA) statement was used to inform the SLR. The contextual analysis investigates those films against the backdrop of a wider socio-political context, including the ideologies that they convey and the impact of state policies, censorship structures and the influence of international film history upon their ideology. It explores film making techniques such as mise-en-scene, editing, visual symbolism, soundscape and digital effects and develops explicit and implicit ideological structures. The results suggest the ideological complexity and dynamism of the Chinese cinema, its changing nature from overt and didactic to rhizomatic and commercially embedded. The study extends Chinese cinema research beyond ideology, highlighting cultural negotiation and socio-political reflection across two periods.
title_en: Digital Cinematic Apparatus and Spectator Subjectivity to Explore the Communication Behaviours in Self-Media Platforms
title_zh: 数字电影装置与观众主体性：探索自媒体平台中的传播行为
abstract_en: Since 1949, the PRC has used cinema as a key instrument for shaping national identity and communicating state narratives. It tracks the changing forms of how filmmakers imagined a national ideology — through structures, aesthetics, cinematography, and technology — from 2001 to 2023 in the cinema. This research examines how cinema operates as a mode of ideological interpretation by analyzing how it activates certain spectator subjectivity and national discourses through the lens of Baudry’s Cinematic Apparatus Theory and Althusser’s Ideological State Apparatus (ISA) Theory. Conducted as a systematic literature review (SLR) of 23 peer-reviewed articles coupled with contextual analysis of representative films that usher in some of the film industry’s most significant ideological transformations, this study has various objectives. The preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses (PRISMA) statement was used to inform the SLR. The contextual analysis investigates those films against the backdrop of a wider socio-political context, including the ideologies that they convey and the impact of state policies, censorship structures and the influence of international film history upon their ideology. It explores film making techniques such as mise-en-scene, editing, visual symbolism, soundscape and digital effects and develops explicit and implicit ideological structures. The results suggest the ideological complexity and dynamism of the Chinese cinema, its changing nature from overt and didactic to rhizomatic and commercially embedded. The study extends Chinese cinema research beyond ideology, highlighting cultural negotiation and socio-political reflection across two periods.
abstract_zh: 自1949年以来，中华人民共和国一直将电影作为塑造国家认同和传播国家叙事的关键工具。本研究追踪了2001年至2023年间电影制作者如何通过结构、美学、电影摄影和技术来想象国家意识形态的变化形式。本研究通过鲍德里的电影装置理论和阿尔都塞的意识形态国家机器理论，分析电影如何激活特定的观众主体性和国家话语，从而考察电影作为一种意识形态解释模式的作用。本研究采用系统文献综述方法，对23篇同行评审文章进行了分析，并结合了对代表性电影的背景分析，这些电影标志着电影行业一些最重要的意识形态转型。系统文献综述遵循了PRISMA声明。背景分析将这些电影置于更广泛的社会政治背景下，包括它们传达的意识形态、国家政策的影响、审查制度以及国际电影史对其意识形态的影响。研究探讨了电影制作技术，如场面调度、剪辑、视觉象征、音景和数字效果，并揭示了显性和隐性的意识形态结构。结果表明，中国电影具有意识形态的复杂性和动态性，其性质从公开说教转变为根茎式且商业嵌入。该研究将中国电影研究扩展到意识形态之外，突出了两个时期内的文化协商和社会政治反思。
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了2001年至2023年间中国电影如何通过技术、美学和叙事来传达国家意识形态。研究者发现，中国电影从早期的直接说教逐渐转变为更复杂、更商业化的形式，但仍然反映社会政治变化。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes how Chinese cinema from 2001 to 2023 conveyed national ideology through technology, aesthetics, and narrative. The researchers found that Chinese films evolved from overtly didactic to more complex and commercial forms, while still reflecting socio-political changes.
